props.type: Determines which progress indicator to render. Can be `linear` or `circular`.
props.label: Text label displayed alongside the progress indicator.
props.labelPosition: Controls the position of the label relative to the progress indicator. Can be `top` or `bottom`.
props.valueFormat: Format string or function for the aria-valuetext. Use `[value]` as a placeholder in strings, or pass a function that receives the current value and returns a string.

slots.label: Slot for custom label content. Receives `{ value, formattedValue }` as scoped props.
